taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: TypeScript, JavaScript, Web application development, Programming logic, Debugging
skill_match_scores: TypeScript:1.0, JavaScript:0.5, Web application development:1.0, Programming logic:0.5, Debugging:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field (or equivalent professional experience), 1-2 years of experience building scalable web applications with a deep focus on TypeScript/Javascript and core web standards, Solid understanding of programming logic, debugging, and client-server architecture, Familiarity with REST APIs and the principles of CI/CD, A proven aptitude for learning new technologies and a proactive approach to mastering new programming languages
preferred_quals: Familiarity with Vue.js (or similar frameworks like React or Angular) and state management patterns, Basic experience with AWS services (S3, Lambda, or DynamoDB), Experience using Git for version control and familiarity with Bitbucket/GitHub, Foundational knowledge of SQL or NoSQL databases and how to perform basic data operations, Exposure to unit testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, or Cypress)
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain modern web applications under the guidance of senior leadership, Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure technical feasibility and a seamless user experience, Troubleshoot and resolve software defects while implementing feature enhancements based on user feedback, Proactively research and adopt new technologies and frameworks to meet evolving project needs, Break down complex requirements and provide accurate development estimates, Write clean, maintainable source code and robust unit tests aligned with technical designs, Actively participate in code reviews to learn best practices and ensure high-quality output, Contribute to clear and concise technical documentation
job_summary: WealthCounsel is committed to fostering a positive work environment and is seeking a motivated Junior Software Developer to join their team. In this role, you will collaborate closely with experienced engineers to design, develop, and maintain high-quality web applications that meet client needs.
